description: Led end-to-end development of mobile and web applications, focusing on scalable architecture, clean code, and high-quality user experience. Managed full project cycles from planning to deployment, implemented modern engineering practices, and delivered performance-optimized solutions for clients across different industries. Collaborated closely with stakeholders to define requirements, improve product workflows, and ensure reliable, maintainable software.

Leading a skilled development team delivering end-to-end mobile and web solutions for clients worldwide. Specializing in cross-platform applications with focus on quality, performance, and user experience.
highlights: Delivered 50+ projects across iOS, Android, and Web platforms
Led a team of developers providing full-stack solutions
Maintained high client satisfaction with repeat business
End-to-end delivery: UI/UX design, API integration, testing, deployment
